title: 2026 Grammy Awards: Album of the Year Predictions - Lady Gaga as Frontrunner
text: Lady Gaga's Mayhem is positioned as the frontrunner to win Album of the Year at the 2026 Grammy Awards, scheduled for February 1st. This would mark her first victory in the category after three previous nominations. Rolling Stone notes that Mayhem represents Gaga's return to her dance-pop roots and is the type of fan service that doesn't dilute the artist. The album features strong performances at Coachella 2025 and an accompanying tour. Kendrick Lamar's GNX captured the momentum following his victory over Drake and has performed strongly critically and commercially according to Spotify's analysis. Bad Bunny presents another upset possibility, having never won outside a Latin category before, and his Super Bowl LX halftime show appearance the week after the Grammys boosts visibility. Tyler, the Creator's Chromakopia showcases thematic growth while Sabrina Carpenter's album provided some of its catchiest hooks throughout the year. The eight nominees competing in this category represent a historic moment with all nominees being first-time Album of the Year contenders.
